contentUri.description: A URI to the image with a default lifetime of 30 minutes.

sourceUri.description: The source URI of the image.

brightness.description: The brightness effect of the image, from -1.0 to 1.0.

contrast.description: The contrast effect of the image, from -1.0 to 1.0.

transparency.description: The transparency effect of the image, from 0.0 to 1.0.

angle.description: The clockwise rotation angle of the image, in radians.
